message:
feat(cli): add session name resolvers and expand shared flag resolution to all robot commands

Introduce a family of session-name resolution helpers that validate,
trim, and normalize session names before they reach robot command
handlers:

- resolveRobotLiveSession: required session, rejects empty/invalid
- resolveOptionalRobotLiveSession: allows empty for optional filters
- resolveRobotSessionFilter: required session with graceful fallback
  when session is gone (useful for history queries on dead sessions)
- resolveOptionalRobotSessionFilter: optional variant of the above
- resolveRobotSessionProjectScope: resolves session + project dir pair

All ~35 robot command entry points in root.go now route through these
resolvers instead of passing raw flag values directly.

Extend shared flag resolution to wait (--panes), route (--strategy,
--exclude), spawn (--timeout, --strategy), and interrupt (--msg, --all,
--force, --timeout) commands with resolveRobotSharedBool for boolean
flags. Update flag descriptions and error messages to reference both
canonical and deprecated forms.

Add comprehensive test coverage for resolver edge cases (prefix
normalization, missing sessions, invalid names, empty optionals) and
shared flag override precedence for the new command families.

Fix minor indentation in spawn.go monitor launch comment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
